name: Zucchini & Tomato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Steam zucchini until crisp tender. Using a slotted spoon, transfer zucchini to a shallow 2 quart casserole dish.
3. Stir pepper and chives into margarine and pour over zucchini.
4. Cover with tomato slices; sprinkle with basil and cheese.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
